name: creator-store-commerce-npcs
description: Verify the selected free Creator Store merchant models load as sanitized visual-only NPCs instead of procedural fallbacks.

args.code: local H=game:GetService('HttpService') local r=workspace.PunchWallRPG local normal,premium for _,d in ipairs(r:GetDescendants()) do if d.Name=='Hero Armory Merchant NPC' then normal=d elseif d.Name=='Premium Hero Robot Merchant NPC' then premium=d end end local function audit(m) local parts,unsafe=0,0 if not m then return 0,99,Vector3.zero end for _,d in ipairs(m:GetDescendants()) do if d:IsA('BasePart') then parts+=1 end if d:IsA('LuaSourceContainer') or d:IsA('Tool') or d:IsA('RemoteEvent') or d:IsA('RemoteFunction') or d:IsA('ClickDetector') or d:IsA('ProximityPrompt') then unsafe+=1 end end local _,s=m:GetBoundingBox() return parts,unsafe,s end local np,nu,ns=audit(normal) local pp,pu,ps=audit(premium) local premiumAsset=premium and premium:GetAttribute('AssetId') return H:JSONEncode({ok=normal~=nil and premium~=nil and normal:GetAttribute('RuntimeVisualClone')==true and premium:GetAttribute('RuntimeVisualClone')==true and normal:GetAttribute('AssetSanitized')==true and premium:GetAttribute('AssetSanitized')==true and premiumAsset==3162411898 and np>2 and pp>2 and nu==0 and pu==0 and ns.Y>4 and ps.Y>4 and ps.Y>ps.X and ps.Y>ps.Z,normalParts=np,premiumParts=pp,normalUnsafe=nu,premiumUnsafe=pu,normalHeight=ns.Y,premiumHeight=ps.Y,premiumWidth=ps.X,premiumDepth=ps.Z,premiumAsset=premiumAsset,normalFallback=r:FindFirstChild('Hero Armory Merchant NPC Fallback',true)~=nil,premiumFallback=r:FindFirstChild('Premium Hero Robot Merchant NPC Fallback',true)~=nil})
